text.message: We’re sharing a lot too black

And if u do I will solo
white youre a fag, this is what you get

Literally asked for your next ore
And you didn’t give it to me
You traded to get an ore
White, you lost the game on that plow
Just like you threw the game
No, brick port was just better
I gave you the chance to play nice
That is not nice of you
Congrats for good beeing a great negotiator
which one of you is the top and which is the bottom?

I was gonna give you my NEXT
